'''Keedo''', often called '''Judge Keedo''', was a local magistrate. He ruled a remote area where typical governments had little say. He ruled with an iron fist and was a bully at heart, which contributed to his ruling style.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-06-10 -->''[[Ultimate Adversaries]]'' {{1stm}}
